sourceId.title: Job ID
sourceId.description: The ID of the job ad as encoded on the website.

adUrl.title: Ad URL
adUrl.description: Url for the details page of the ad.

requestedDetailUrl.title: Requested Detail URL
requestedDetailUrl.description: Canonical jobs.cz details URL requested by the crawler before redirects.

finalDetailUrl.title: Final Detail URL
finalDetailUrl.description: Final page URL after redirects where the HTML snapshot was captured.

finalDetailHost.title: Final Detail Host
finalDetailHost.description: Hostname derived from finalDetailUrl for grouping/debugging custom-hosted pages.

detailRedirected.title: Detail Redirected
detailRedirected.description: Whether the final detail URL differs from the requested jobs.cz detail URL.

detailRenderType.title: Detail Render Type
detailRenderType.description: Heuristic rendering pattern detected for the detail page before HTML snapshot.

detailRenderSignal.title: Detail Render Signal
detailRenderSignal.description: Render completeness signal that was used before snapshotting HTML.

detailRenderTextChars.title: Detail Render Text Chars
detailRenderTextChars.description: Character count measured in the render target element used for completeness checks.

detailRenderWaitMs.title: Detail Render Wait Ms
detailRenderWaitMs.description: Milliseconds spent waiting for dynamic detail page content to render before snapshot.

detailRenderComplete.title: Detail Render Complete
detailRenderComplete.description: Whether the selected render completeness condition was satisfied before snapshot.

jobTitle.title: Job Title
jobTitle.description: The title name of the job position.

location.title: Location
location.description: The location of the company as extracted from the list page.

salary.title: Salary
salary.description: Salary as advertised on the site.

scrapedAt.title: Scraped At
scrapedAt.description: The date in ISO format when the ad was scraped.

htmlDetailPageKey.title: HTML Key
htmlDetailPageKey.description: Key that identifies the html blob from the details page.

detailHtmlByteSize.title: Detail HTML Byte Size
detailHtmlByteSize.description: UTF-8 byte size of the rendered HTML snapshot saved to the key-value store.

detailHtmlSha256.title: Detail HTML SHA-256
detailHtmlSha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the rendered HTML snapshot saved to the key-value store.
